headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Revvity, Lowers Price Target to $90
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Casey Woodring   maintains Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $96 to $90.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Revvity, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Dan Brennan   maintains Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) with a Buy and raises the price target from $115 to $120.

headline: Stifel Maintains Hold on Revvity, Lowers Price Target to $100
summary: Stifel  analyst Daniel Arias   maintains Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $110 to $100.
